Title: 3M Partnerships and Events

URL Source: https://www.3m.com/3M/en_US/about-3m/partnerships-events/

Markdown Content:
At 3M, we believe in the power of connection. Through partnerships and events, we bring our innovation to life, build trust with our customers, inspire employees, and create meaningful impact in the communities we serve. From world-class sporting events to industry-leading tech showcases, and lifting up tomorrow's workers, 3M's presence extends far beyond products: we create experiences that matter.

Our approach to Partnerships and Events is rooted in five core outcomes:

*   **Build trust and loyalty.**
*   **Deepen relationships.**
*   **Drive growth.**
*   **Impact communities.**
*   **Raise employee satisfaction.**

Whether it’s on the fairway, the show floor, or the classroom, every 3M event is an opportunity to demonstrate how our technologies power modern life — and how our partnerships build a better tomorrow.

## Why we show up

Every activation is designed to elevate the 3M brand, grow our business, and build a more connected, purposeful future. Partnerships and events are a key part of our enterprise strategy. We:

### Create immersive experiences

Show how 3M technologies enable modern life.

### Improve lives in our communities

Drive positive impact through purpose-led engagements.

### Strengthen relationships

Build trust with customers and key stakeholders.

### Enhance employee satisfaction

Boost pride and engagement through meaningful programs.

### Invest in future innovators

Support the next generation of skilled talent.

Showcasing excellence through sport

### 3M Open

As title sponsor of the PGA TOUR’s 3M Open, we bring fans and communities together through world-class golf, family-friendly experiences, and a purpose-driven mission. Since its inception in 2019, the 3M Open has raised over **$8.5 million** for local organizations — making a difference where we work and live.

Our commitment to the 3M Open extends beyond golf. It’s a platform to showcase how 3M Science improves lives — from Automotive, Aerospace, Data and Robotics innovations to next-generation adhesives used in sports, electronics and more. We’re proud to extend our partnership through **2030**, ensuring continued impact and innovation.

![Image 1: A golfer wearing a black shirt and white pants holds up a clear trophy triumphantly on a golf course, with a water hazard and trees in the background.](https://multimedia.3m.com/mws/media/2588919D/public-affairs-div-only-2024-3m-open-champion-jhonattan-vegas.jpg)

### Official Science Partner of the Minnesota Vikings

3M is proud to be the **Official Science Partner of the Minnesota Vikings**, a collaboration that blends innovation, community, and hometown spirit. During the construction of **U.S. Bank Stadium**, more than **50 3M products** played a role in bringing the venue to life — from adhesives and films to personal safety equipment and building materials.

Today, our partnership goes beyond the field to support all fans, including those with sensory needs. The **3M Sensory Room** inside the stadium provides a calming, inclusive environment designed to ensure every fan can enjoy the game comfortably. Together, 3M and the Vikings are redefining what it means to create a world-class, accessible fan experience. From the roof to the field, 3M is an integral part of the game day experience.

### Annika Intercollegiate

In partnership with golf legend Annika Sörenstam, the Annika Intercollegiate empowers the next generation of women golfers. This elite collegiate event highlights 3M’s ongoing support for equity in sports and leadership development on and off the course.

### Latin America Amateur Championship

We proudly support this championship as a way to grow the game of golf and inspire emerging talent across Latin America. The event celebrates both competition and community — values 3M holds at the core of every partnership.

### Asia-Pacific Amateur Championship

As a global science company, 3M is proud to support golf around the world. This championship, developed to grow the game across the Asia-Pacific region, reflects our commitment to innovation, excellence, and cultural connection.

### Consumer Electronics Show (CES)

Each year at CES, we showcase how 3M technologies are shaping the future — from automotive innovation and smart homes to sustainability and advanced manufacturing.

**In 2025, 3M was honored with "Best in Show"** by Exhibitor Magazine for our immersive, design-forward booth experience. CES is more than a trade show — it’s a space where we connect with global leaders and Media, demonstrate the breadth of 3M’s expertise, and highlight how 3M Science solves real-world challenges.

![Image 2: An exhibition booth with a large, illuminated entrance made of colorful panels, featuring the 3M logo and the word complicated on the wall.](https://multimedia.3m.com/mws/media/2555162V/3m-ces-2025-booth-exterior.jpg)

### 3M Young Scientist Challenge

In partnership with **Discovery Education**, the 3M Young Scientist Challenge is a nationwide competition that invites middle school students to tackle real-world problems through science and innovation. Finalists receive mentorship from 3M scientists to help bring their ideas to life.

This program sparks curiosity, confidence, and creative problem-solving in tomorrow’s changemakers — showing students that with science, anything is possible.

![Image 3: Three individuals stand together holding a large ceremonial check for the 3M Young Scientist Challenge.](https://multimedia.3m.com/mws/media/2391909V/two-adult-men-presenting-young-man-with-large-prize-check-for-winning-3m-young-scientist-challenge-20.jpg)

### SkillsUSA

Through our partnership with **SkillsUSA**, 3M supports hands-on learning and workforce readiness for high school and college students pursuing careers in skilled trades. From welding and machining to automotive personalization and repair, and electronics, these students represent the future of our workforce — and 3M is proud to be part of their journey.

By investing in SkillsUSA, we’re helping close the skilled labor gap and empowering students to lead with excellence, purpose, and confidence.

### University of Minnesota

3M’s partnership with the **University of Minnesota** spans more than a century and continues to fuel innovation, education, and community impact across the state. With over **70,000 University of Minnesota alumni** working at 3M, this relationship represents one of the strongest industry-academic connections in the region.

From pioneering joint research to supporting student success, our collaboration is grounded in a shared commitment to discovery and progress. As the naming partner of the iconic **3M Arena at Mariucci**, we celebrate our legacy of leadership and continue to invest in the next generation of thinkers, makers, and leaders.

## Discover more from 3M
